_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

author: doro
content: BATCH-22 Flutter 死代码 + 调试 sentinel 清扫完成。5 条 finding 闭环：F-W2A-073（main.dart 6 个 debugPaint 赋值 + import）/ F-W2A-031（change_source_dialog 2 处 print('ZZZZ')）/ F-W2A-032（同文件 nameMatch=true && authorMatch=true 死包裹，顺手删 3 个仅服务 print 的局部变量）/ F-W2A-050（providers.dart 4 行墓志铭注释）/ F-W2A-047（simulation_page_delegate 2 个 const Offset 字段 + 2 个 unused getter + 7 行解释注释）。F-W3-027 build.gradle Flutter 模板注释本批不做（价值低）。flutter analyze 0 issue；flutter test 404/404 PASS 维持。净 -约 30 行纯减法。
